spec.name: An Arched Hall
spec.description: This hallway has a beautiful arch to it, formed painstakingly and exquisitely out of the sandy stones of the pyramid. To the east is a small, golden-coloured crypt, and the hall proceeds to the south and north.

north.description: The arched hall proceeds to the north, making a sharp westward turn.

east.description: A small golden crypt lies to the east.

south.description: The arched hall proceeds to the south.
